approaches.title: Sort unique values and binary-search ranks
approaches.summary: Create a sorted, deduplicated copy of the array, then determine each element's 1-based rank via binary search. Revision 2 retains this strategy while writing-rน

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Sorts and deduplicates a copy, then maps each original value to its 1-based rank using binary search.
Preserves the same ranking algorithm but transforms the input vector in place, avoiding a separate result allocation.
